title: Creating your first theme
excerpt: Learn how to create your first Static Website Generator theme using Astro and JSON.
content:
# Creating your first theme

Themes in Static Website Generator are standard Astro projects.

## Getting Started

Clone the Theme Starter repository and install the dependencies.

```bash
npm install
npm run dev
```

## Project Structure

The `export` directory contains the JSON generated by SWG. Your theme reads these files directly.

## Build Your Theme

Create your layouts, components and templates while keeping the SWG export format unchanged.

## Package Your Theme

When your theme is finished, package it and import it into Static Website Generator.
meta_description: Learn how to build your first Static Website Generator theme using Astro.
